name: claude-ads
description: Free-first paid advertising audit and AI creative generation for Claude Code, focused on the 3 platforms where 95% of advertiser spend lives: Meta, Google, TikTok. ~158 weighted audit checks, parallel agents, industry templates, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, /ads update for refreshing platform references with the last 30 days of changes, and /ads publish for posting generated creatives to 14+ social networks via Zernio (free for 2 accounts).
